CuraLive — Operator Platform Links

Training, Console Access & Event Setup

Internal Use Only  |  Prepared: March 2026  |  Platform: CuraLive v1.0

Note on URLs: The links below use the current development server address. For permanent links that never change, the platform needs to be published to production — contact your platform administrator.
Step 1 — Training (Complete Before Going Live)

All operators must complete the training path below before operating a live event. The recommended order is: Operator Hub → Training Guide → Training Mode → Shadow a live event.

Page Purpose Link
Operator Hub Start here. Full learning path, call-type guides, and quick reference. …/operator-hub
OCC Training Guide 4-phase interactive guide covering OCC layout, participant management, Q&A, compliance, and pro techniques. Quiz at end of each phase (75% to pass). …/training
Training Mode Console Isolated sandbox — practice running Earnings Calls, Audio Bridges, Video Webcasts, and Board Meetings. Nothing here affects production. …/training-mode
Operator Reference Guide Quick-reference for dial-in numbers, platform integrations, webphone setup, and escalation procedures. …/operator-guide
Step 2 — The Operator Console (Live Events)

The OCC (Operator Control Centre) is the main workspace during a live event. Open it at least 15 minutes before the event start time.

Page Purpose Link
Operator Console (OCC) Main operator workspace. Conference overview, CCP, Q&A management, lounge, webphone, and all live event controls. …/occ
Operator Analytics Personal performance dashboard — calls handled, average handle time, quality scores, and training certifications. …/operator/analytics
Step 3 — Setting Up Events

Use these pages to schedule conferences, create webcasts, and manage the event calendar. Set up events at least 30 minutes before they are due to start.

Page Purpose Link
Schedule an Event Create Audio Bridge / Earnings Call conferences. Sets up dial-in numbers, conference IDs, and participant lists. …/events/schedule
Event Calendar View all scheduled, live, and completed events. Quickly open the OCC for any active event. …/events/calendar
Webcasting Hub Create and manage Audio Webcasts and Video Webcasts. Start here when setting up any internet-streamed event. …/live-video/webcasting
Create New Webcast Step-by-step wizard to create a new Audio or Video Webcast including registration page, speaker bridge, and stream settings. …/live-video/webcast/create
Recommended Operator Checklist

Before operating your first live event, confirm you have completed each of the following:

  1. Training Guide: Completed all 4 phases and passed each quiz (75% minimum).
  2. Training Mode: Completed at least one full practice session for your event type (Earnings Call, Audio Bridge, or Video Webcast). Scored 4 or more stars.
  3. Shadow session: Observed an experienced operator running a live event.
  4. Headset and webphone: Tested your audio equipment and confirmed webphone registration at least 15 minutes before the event.
  5. OCC status: Set your status to Present & Ready in the OCC before the event start time.
  6. Escalation path: You know who to contact if something goes wrong during a live call.
CuraLive Platform  |  Internal Operator Documentation  |  March 2026
